$schema-comment: Template for `a365 develop-mcp register-external-mcp-server -f <file>`. Copy this file to scripts/agent365-mcp-registration.json and replace ALL <PLACEHOLDER> values. The serverName MUST start with 'ext_' and be at most 20 characters. See docs/AGENT_365_BYO_MCP.md for the full flow.
description: ServiceNow Service Catalog: search items, fill forms, place and manage orders.

tools.name: search_catalog_items
tools.description: Search ServiceNow catalog items using a natural-language query.

tools.name: get_catalog_item_form
tools.description: Get the order form for a selected ServiceNow catalog item.

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Place a ServiceNow catalog order with the collected form values.

tools.name: list_user_orders
tools.description: Retrieve all current (non-closed) orders for the authenticated user.

tools.name: update_order
tools.description: Update a small allowlist of fields (short_description, description, comments, urgency, priority) on the caller's catalog order.

tools.name: get_order_detail
tools.description: Retrieve a single ServiceNow request (sc_request) by sys_id, including its items and approval records.

tools.name: validate_servicenow_config
tools.description: Validate ServiceNow authentication and catalog access end-to-end.

tools.name: add_to_cart
tools.description: Add a ServiceNow catalog item to the user's cart without ordering yet.

tools.name: view_cart
tools.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's current ServiceNow cart contents.

tools.name: update_cart_item
tools.description: Update a line item in the ServiceNow cart — change its quantity and/or variable values.

tools.name: remove_cart_item
tools.description: Remove a single line item from the ServiceNow cart.

tools.name: submit_cart
tools.description: Submit the entire ServiceNow cart as a single request (one REQ with multiple requested items).

tools.name: update_order_item
tools.description: Update a single requested item (line item) on an existing order — quantity, comments, short_description, description.

tools.name: remove_order_item
tools.description: Remove a single requested item (line item) from an existing order without cancelling the whole request.

tools.name: get_incident_form
tools.description: Open the 'report an incident' form so the user can describe a problem with IT.

tools.name: report_incident
tools.description: Report (create) a ServiceNow incident for the end user from the report form values.

tools.name: list_user_incidents
tools.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's own open and recently resolved ServiceNow incidents.

tools.name: get_incident_detail
tools.description: Retrieve a single ServiceNow incident by sys_id, including status and customer-visible comments.

tools.name: add_incident_comment
tools.description: Add a customer-visible additional comment to one of the user's ServiceNow incidents.
